# Podcast Studio / Audio Platform Site — Nigeria-First Research Brief

**Niche ID:** P3-podcast-studio-podcast-studio-site
**Vertical slug:** podcast-studio
**VN-ID:** VN-CRE-003
**Niche family:** NF-CRE-POD (standalone)
**Family role:** standalone
**Research date:** 2026-04-26

## 1. Nigerian Business Reality
Nigeria's podcasting scene is growing rapidly — Business Lunch with Stacey, I Said What I Said, The Honest Bunch, and The Podman are established Nigerian shows. Boomplay and Audiomack dominate local listening; Spotify Africa is rapidly growing. Studios range from professional broadcast-quality suites to home-studio rental setups. Revenue comes from studio hire (₦15,000–₦80,000/session), episode production retainers, and distribution packages. WhatsApp studio booking is standard.

## 2. Target Audience Profile
- **Ade, 29, Lagos content creator**: Wants to produce a podcast. Needs studio with good equipment, affordable session rates, and post-production services. Books via WhatsApp.
- **Toyin, 42, corporate communications manager**: Looking to start a company podcast. Needs full-service studio, script editing, and distribution to Spotify. Requests a quote via email/WhatsApp.
- **Emeka, 35, independent journalist**: Needs a quiet studio for interview recording. Wants hourly rate and location info.

## 3. Recommended Website Structure
- **Home**: Hero (studio name, specialty), studio photo, WhatsApp booking CTA, services summary, equipment list, distribution platforms logos
- **About**: Studio story, engineer profile, equipment inventory, past clients
- **Services**: Session packages with ₦ pricing (hourly, half-day, full-day), production add-ons, distribution service
- **Contact**: WhatsApp booking, studio tour request form (NDPR-compliant), location and hours

## 4. Content Tone & Voice
Creative, professional, tech-savvy. "Studio-Quality Sound, Lagos-First", "Boomplay & Spotify Distributed", "Book Your Session" language. Reference Boomplay, Audiomack, Spotify Africa. Primary CTA: "Book a Studio Session". Secondary: "WhatsApp for a Quote".

## 5. Trust Signal Inventory
- CAC registration
- NBC content compliance (for broadcast-linked content)
- Equipment brand logos (Shure, Rode, Focusrite)
- Distribution platform badges (Boomplay, Audiomack, Spotify, Apple Podcasts)
- Past client podcast cover art
- Google reviews

## 6. Image Direction (5-7 Specific Concepts)
1. Professional podcast studio interior — microphones, acoustic panels, Nigerian studio
2. Host recording episode — headphones on, engaged expression, Lagos studio
3. Engineer at mixing console — professional broadcast environment
4. Distribution platform logos on screen — Boomplay, Spotify, Audiomack
5. Two guests having interview — podcast table setup, branded mic flags
6. Podcast cover art gallery — Nigerian shows on screen
7. Studio exterior — professional signage, creative agency building, Lagos

## 7. Regulatory Compliance Checklist
- [ ] NBC content standards compliance for broadcast-related content
- [ ] CAC registration
- [ ] NDPR consent on booking/contact form
- [ ] Copyright notice for produced content

## 8. Nigeria-First Compliance Checklist
- [x] WhatsApp booking CTA prominent
- [x] Boomplay/Audiomack distribution references
- [x] Nigerian podcast show references
- [x] ₦ pricing for all packages
- [x] Mobile-first layout
- [x] esc() on all inputs
- [x] NDPR on contact form
